edit.cover_hint: Use a portrait 3:4 cover, recommended 600×800 px. PNG/JPG are supported; large images are auto-fitted.

emulator.cheat.add_first: Add a custom cheat in the top-right first
emulator.cheat.add_subtitle: Enter name, type, and code, then save
emulator.cheat.add_tip: Tap Custom Cheat to add one
emulator.cheat.close_note: Disable: quick-save first, restart, then auto quick-load.
emulator.cheat.code_hint:
Cheat code, for example:
XXXXXXXX YYYY
XXXXXXXX YYYY
emulator.cheat.conflict_tip: Tip: Walk-through-walls and shiny may conflict when both are enabled; use one at a time if needed.
emulator.cheat.dispatched_reset: Sent {count} cheats / {lines} lines and soft reset
emulator.cheat.no_quick_after_restart: Restarted and disabled cheats, but no quick save exists
emulator.cheat.quick_load_failed: Restarted and disabled cheats, but quick load failed
emulator.cheat.quick_save_failed_restart: Quick save failed, still restarting game to disable cheats
emulator.cheat.quick_saved_restart: Quick save complete, restarting game to disable cheats
emulator.cheat.reload_cancelled: Reload was cancelled; A toggles instantly, native engine is still in development
emulator.cheat.restarting_apply_remainin: Restarting, quick-loading, and applying remaining cheats
emulator.cheat.restarting_cleanup: Disabled cheats; restarting current game and quick-loading
emulator.cheat.restored_clean: Restored to the clean state before enabling cheats
emulator.cheat.stable_note: This is the stable path; seamless disable needs a native CheatManager later.
emulator.cheat.thread_timeout: Emulator thread did not respond in time. Return to the game and try again.
emulator.cheat.type_hint: Cheat type, for example: CodeBreaker / GameShark
emulator.cheat.up_to_date: Cheats are already up to date
emulator.hint.custom_cheats: A add/toggle, B back; use the delete button to remove cheats.
emulator.hint.delete: Up/Down select, A delete, B back. Quick save can also be deleted.
emulator.hint.delete_cheat: Up/Down select, A delete, B back.
emulator.hint.fc_cheats: FC/NES built-in cheats are reserved for later.
emulator.hint.fc_cheats_external: You can still use cheat features in an external emulator.
emulator.hint.fc_virtual_editor: Touch opacity is available; position editing will use the common editor later.
emulator.hint.load: Up/Down select a slot, A load and close menu, B back.
emulator.hint.main: Up/Down to choose, A enter, B back. {exit} exits.
emulator.hint.reset: Cold reload current ROM from the beginning without deleting saves.
emulator.hint.restart: Restart the current core from the beginning without leaving the game screen.
emulator.hint.save: Up/Down select, A save, Y load, X delete, B back.
emulator.hint.virtual_alpha: Controller-mode opacity. Left/right adjust, B back.
emulator.hint.virtual_editor: Drag buttons; tap increase/decrease or use left/right to resize, then save.
emulator.menu.title: Built-in {platform} Menu
emulator.native_cheat_pending: Still using the LibretroDroid backend; seamless My Boy!-style toggles need a native mGBA CheatManager.
emulator.rom_input_failed: Unable to open ROM input stream
emulator.subtitle.fc_virtual: Opacity and controller-mode virtual button hiding
emulator.subtitle.save: Manage saves, loads, deletes, and quick save
emulator.subtitle.virtual: Opacity, position, size, and custom combo buttons
emulator.unsupported_7z: Built-in {platform} does not support direct 7z loading yet. Extract it first, or use an external emulator.
emulator.virtual.add_message: After adding, the button appears in the center. Drag it in the editor and use left/right to resize.
emulator.virtual.add_method_hint: Method: A+B / SELECT+X / Save / Load / Fast / Exit
emulator.virtual.alpha_note: Default is 0%. Raise it only if you need touch assistance while using a controller.
emulator.virtual.editor_sub.add: Enter a label, style, and method, then place it on the screen center
emulator.virtual.editor_sub.cancel: Discard unsaved changes and return to game
emulator.virtual.editor_sub.common_edito: Common editor entry reserved; later it will share GBA drag/resize logic
emulator.virtual.editor_sub.decrease: Decrease the selected virtual button size
emulator.virtual.editor_sub.increase: Increase the selected virtual button size
emulator.virtual.editor_sub.save: Save all virtual button positions and sizes, then return to game
emulator.virtual.editor_sub.touch_alpha: A cycles opacity; left/right fine-tunes touch button opacity
emulator.virtual.editor_tip: Tap increase/decrease, or use left/right on a controller; tap × to collapse this panel.
emulator.virtual.return_message: Discard unsaved virtual button position/size changes and return to the game?
emulator.virtual.select_first: Select a virtual button on the screen first
emulator.virtual.selected: Current: {name}; drag buttons to move them, use left/right to resize.
emulator.virtual.subtitle.editor: Drag button positions, resize with left/right, add combo buttons
emulator.warning.large_rom: Large hack ROM detected. Starting cleanly; use an external emulator if it still fails.
emulator.warning.mapper115: Mapper 115 translation/hack ROM detected. Starting cleanly with Nestopia core.
emulator.warning.nes2_high_mapper: NES2.0 high mapper ({mapper}) ROM detected. Starting cleanly with Nestopia core.
emulator.warning.not_ines: Not a standard iNES/NES2 ROM header. Built-in core may fail to start; try an external emulator if needed.
emulator.warning.short_header: ROM header is incomplete. Built-in core may fail to start; try an external emulator if needed.
emulator.warning.uncommon_mapper: Uncommon mapper ({mapper}) ROM detected. Starting cleanly; use an external emulator if it still fails.

emulator.zip_no_rom: No supported ROM found in ZIP

settings.controller.default_tip: Default: quick save=L1, quick load=R1, fast forward=R3, menu=L2, exit=SELECT+X, turbo A=X, turbo B=Y. Multi-button combos have priority over single buttons, so SELECT+X exits before X turbo.
